title: OpenBack is ready locally
description: The complete deterministic RTS, maps, bots, diplomacy, ships, structures, and missile systems now run from this source tree.

title: Source and licenses included
description: OpenBack preserves the OpenFront contributor notices and ships its AGPL and Creative Commons license files with the source.

title: New Player Tutorial
description: Learn the gameplay shared by OpenBack and its OpenFront upstream in this video guide
